label: phishing
subject: Terms Update Effective Thu, March 19, 2026
body_excerpt: To help ensure everything continues to run smoothly, we recommend that you review your account information and confirm that your billing details are up to date.
notes: Caso real reportado pelo usuário. O risco principal está no spoofing da marca e no contexto do email.

label: phishing
subject: Verify your Coinbase account activity
body_excerpt: We noticed unusual activity on your account. Review your profile immediately to avoid limitations.
notes: Caso de calibração com mismatch de marca e domínio.

label: legitimo
subject: New sign-in on Windows
body_excerpt: A new sign-in was detected on your Google Account. If this was you, no further action is needed.
notes: Caso legítimo para verificar se o detector não penaliza comunicações reais de provedores conhecidos.
